name: list_incidents
description: List all incidents on a status page, ordered by creation date (newest first). Returns incident ID, name, status, impact, affected components, and the full update history. Incidents can have statuses: investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved, or postmortem.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The ID of the status page.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query to filter incidents by name.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return (default 100).

incident_updates.body: We have deployed a fix and are monitoring the results. Error rates are returning to normal levels.
We are investigating elevated error rates on our API. Some requests may return 500 errors.
